sections.paragraph:
χαλινός, οῦ, ὁ (Hom. et al.; PSI 543, 50; PCairZen 659, 11 [both III b.c.]; LXX; Jos., Ant. 18, 320; loanw. in rabb.) bit, bridle Js 3:3 (cp. Theognis 551 ἵπποισʼ ἔμβαλλε χαλινούς; Soph., Antig. 477; X., Res Equ. 6, 7 ἵνα τὸν χ. ὀρθῶς ἐμβάλῃ; Philo, Agr. 94; cp. the Plut. quot. s.v. πηδάλιον); Rv 14:20.—DELG. M-M.

Hom Hom , VIII b.c.—List 5

et al. et al. = et alii (and others)

PSI PSI = Papiri greci e latini: Pubblicazioni della Società Italiana—List 4

PCairZen PCairZen = Zenon Papyri, Catalogue général . . . du Musée du Caire—List 4

LXX LXX = Septuaginta, ed. ARahlfs, unless otherwise specified—Lists 2, beg.

Jos. Jos. = Josephus. This abbr. used when follow by title; I a.d.—Lists 5

loanw. loanw. = loanword

rabb. rabb. = rabbinical (literature etc.)

  1. cp. = compare, freq. in ref. to citation fr. ancient texts

Theognis Theognis , VI b.c.—List 5

Soph Soph , V b.c.—List 5

  1. X. = Xenophon, V–IV b.c.—List 5

Philo Philo = P. of Alexandria, I b.c.–I a.d.—List 5

Agr Agr = Agraphon (non-canonical sayings of Jesus)—List 1

Plut Plut , I–II a.d.—List 5

quot. quot. = quotation

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

M-M M-M = JMoulton/GMilligan, Vocabulary of Greek Testament—Lists 4, 6

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 1076
